Mo Salah is set to move to Saudi Arabia whilst Liverpool will also sell Harvey Elliott to raise funds. arts.sum: AFC Bournemouth want to make a move for Barcelona’s Pablo Torre in the winter market. That’s according to Saturday’s edition of Sport, and they explain Bournemouth are ‘very interested’ in Torre. Andoni Iraola has been an admirer of the midfielder from his time at Rayo Vallecano.
